title: ctenitis inaequalifolia
intro: Ctenitis inaequalifolia, also known as the Inequality Tree Fern, is a plant species in the family Dryopteridaceae that is native to tropical Asia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Ctenitis inaequalifolia include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fronds are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
